item.title: 你今年的胜利是什么？ | What was your win this year?
item.description:
托马斯·汉森

发表于 2022 年 12 月 31 日

我会开始。 我正在为 Chuck Norris DVD 的复制品制作背景音乐。 特色部分😎

见上图😊

啊，你的意思是代码......？ 你有你的贴纸包吗？

一旦暂停，polterguy 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，polterguy 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，polterguy 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 polterguy 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 polterguy：

降低 polterguy 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 polterguy 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Thomas Hansen

Posted on Dec 31, 2022

I'll start. I'm doing the background music on a repro of a Chuck Norris DVD. Special features section 😎

See above image 😊

Chicken Pickin' - It's on SoundCloud if you look for it ...

Ahh, you meant CODE ...? 🤪

Do you have your sticker pack yet?

Michael Tharrington (he/him) - Dec 10

Michael Tharrington (he/him) - Dec 5

Once suspended, polterguy will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, polterguy will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by polterguy will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If polterguy is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag polterguy:

Make all posts by polterguy less visible

polterguy consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging polterguy will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: polterguy
